log: REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Loxodon — Armored Tank.
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:20+3=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:16+-2=14 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 15] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Loxodon — Armored Tank (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:15+9=24 vs AC 20] HIT! 27 damage. Loxodon — Armored Tank HP: 32/59
--- Loxodon — Armored Tank --- HP: 32/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:6+3=9 vs DC 15] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 133/138
REASONING: Throwing rock at Loxodon — Armored Tank (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:12+9=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 20 damage. Loxodon — Armored Tank HP: 12/59
--- Loxodon — Armored Tank --- HP: 12/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (12/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Loxodon — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
